message:
Fix clone failure: retry decompression with larger buffers for high-ratio objects

- readObject used a fixed 4x decompression buffer, which was too small for
  highly compressible files (JSON, repetitive text can compress 100x+).
  Now retries with 4x/16x/64x/256x multipliers, capped at 32MB.
- zlibDeflate output buffer now accounts for stored-block overhead instead
  of a fixed +64 margin.
- buildPackfile logs warnings for missing/failed objects instead of silently
  skipping them.

Stress test results (all pass with integrity OK):
  100 files: push 411ms, clone 270ms
  1K files: push 2.8s, clone 1.0s
  5K files: push 17.7s, clone 4.6s
  10K files: push 51.6s, clone 9.7s
  node_modules 15 pkgs (4,479 files): push 4.8s, clone 2.4s
  node_modules 24 pkgs (16,019 files): push 23.4s, clone 10.9s
